etf_trend_rotation.instrument_scope: SPY, QQQ, XLK, XLF, XLV, XLE, XLI, XLY
etf_trend_rotation.trigger: first day a trend-qualified ETF becomes newly eligible

sector_confirmed_pullback_continuation.trigger: first day a controlled pullback becomes newly eligible
filters: pullback from prior 20D high between 2% and 15%

breakout_confirmation.trigger: first confirmed close above the prior 20-day high

selective_mean_reversion.trigger: first oversold rebound day after a sharp 5D setback
